languages.text: Платформа Тиркуаз-4 погрузилась на дно, похоронив с собой технологии добычи ресурсов, незнакомые Человечеству. Прометиевый кризис сильно сказался на станции Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17, прервав священную медитацию и жизни более трети местного техножречества.

Platform Tirkuaz-4 sank to the ocean floor, taking with it resource extraction technologies unknown to Humanity. The promethium crisis severely affected Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, interrupting sacred meditation and the lives of more than a third of the Tech-Priests on the station.
languages.original_text: Платформа Тиркуаз-4 погрузилась на дно, похоронив с собой технологии добычи ресурсов, незнакомые Человечеству. Прометиевый кризис сильно сказался на станции Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17, прервав священную медитацию и жизни более трети местного техножречества.

traits.locale_text: Platform Tirkuaz-4 sank to the ocean floor, taking with it resource extraction technologies unknown to Humanity. The promethium crisis severely affected Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, interrupting sacred meditation and the lives of more than a third of the tech-priests on the station.

Platform Tirkuaz-4 sank to the ocean floor, taking with it resource extraction technologies unknown to Humanity. The promethium crisis severely affected Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, interrupting sacred meditation and the lives of more than a third of the tech-priests on the station.

Platform Tirkuaz-4 sank to the ocean floor, taking with it resource extraction technologies unknown to Humanity. The promethium crisis severely affected Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, interrupting sacred meditation and the lives of more than a third of the tech-priests on the station.

languages.text: プラットフォーム「ティルクアズ-4」は海底に沈み、人類には未知の資源採取技術を海底に沈めた。プロメシウム危機はアルター・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト・17に深刻な影響を与え、聖なる瞑想と技術司祭の3分の1以上の生活を妨げた。
languages.original_text: Platform Tirkuaz-4 sank to the ocean floor, taking with it resource extraction technologies unknown to Humanity. The promethium crisis severely affected Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, interrupting sacred meditation and the lives of more than a third of the tech-priests on the station.

traits.locale_text: プラットフォーム「ティルクアズ-4」は海底に沈み、人類には未知の資源採取技術を海底に沈めた。プロメシウム危機はアルター・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト・17に深刻な影響を与え、聖なる瞑想と技術司祭の3分の1以上の生活を妨げた。

languages.text: 提库阿兹4号平台沉入海底，随之带走了人类未知的资源开采技术。紧随其后的钷素危机重创了卡利西斯祭坛17号，致使神圣冥想中断，危及了星站上超过三分之一的技术神甫的生命。
languages.original_text: Platform Tirkuaz-4 sank to the ocean floor, taking with it resource extraction technologies unknown to Humanity. The promethium crisis severely affected Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, interrupting sacred meditation and the lives of more than a third of the Tech-Priests on the station.

traits.locale_text: 提库阿兹4号平台沉入海底，随之带走了人类未知的资源开采技术。紧随其后的钷素危机重创了卡利西斯祭坛17号，致使神圣冥想中断，危及了星站上超过三分之一的技术神甫的生命。

languages.text: La plateforme Tirkuaz-4 coula au fond de l'océan en emportant des technologies d'extraction de ressources inconnues de l'humanité. La crise du prométhium perturba considérablement Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, interrompant la méditation sacrée et les vies de plus d'un tiers des technoprêtres de la station.
languages.original_text: Platform Tirkuaz-4 sank to the ocean floor, taking with it resource extraction technologies unknown to Humanity. The promethium crisis severely affected Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, interrupting sacred meditation and the lives of more than a third of the Tech-Priests on the station.

traits.locale_text: La plateforme Tirkuaz-4 coula au fond de l'océan en emportant des technologies d'extraction de ressources inconnues de l'humanité. La crise du prométhium perturba considérablement Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, interrompant la méditation sacrée et les vies de plus d'un tiers des technoprêtres de la station.

languages.text: La plataforma Tirkuaz-4 se hundió en el océano, llevándose consigo tecnología de extracción de recursos desconocida para la Humanidad. La crisis del prometio afectó gravemente a Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, hasta el punto de interrumpir la meditación sagrada y las vidas de más de un tercio de los tecnosacerdotes de la estación.
languages.original_text: Platform Tirkuaz-4 sank to the ocean floor, taking with it resource extraction technologies unknown to Humanity. The promethium crisis severely affected Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, interrupting sacred meditation and the lives of more than a third of the Tech-Priests on the station.

traits.locale_text: La plataforma Tirkuaz-4 se hundió en el océano, llevándose consigo tecnología de extracción de recursos desconocida para la Humanidad. La crisis del prometio afectó gravemente a Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, hasta el punto de interrumpir la meditación sagrada y las vidas de más de un tercio de los tecnosacerdotes de la estación.

languages.text: Platform Tirkuaz-4, İnsanlığın bilinmeyen kaynak çıkarma teknolojilerini de beraberinde götürerek okyanusun dibini boyladı. Prometyum krizi, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'yi ciddi şekilde etkileyerek kutsal meditasyonu ve istasyondaki tekno rahiplerin üçte birinden fazlasının hayatını sekteye uğrattı.
languages.original_text: Platform Tirkuaz-4 sank to the ocean floor, taking with it resource extraction technologies unknown to Humanity. The promethium crisis severely affected Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, interrupting sacred meditation and the lives of more than a third of the Tech-Priests on the station.

traits.locale_text: Platform Tirkuaz-4, İnsanlığın bilinmeyen kaynak çıkarma teknolojilerini de beraberinde götürerek okyanusun dibini boyladı. Prometyum krizi, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'yi ciddi şekilde etkileyerek kutsal meditasyonu ve istasyondaki tekno rahiplerin üçte birinden fazlasının hayatını sekteye uğrattı.

languages.text: Plattform Tirkuaz-4 versank mit ihren, der Menschheit unbekannten, Technologien zur Gewinnung von Ressourcen im Ozean. Die Promethiumkrise hatte erhebliche Auswirkungen auf Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, da sie die heilige Meditation störte und mehr als ein Drittel der Techpriester auf der Station das Leben kostete.
languages.original_text: Platform Tirkuaz-4 sank to the ocean floor, taking with it resource extraction technologies unknown to Humanity. The promethium crisis severely affected Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, interrupting sacred meditation and the lives of more than a third of the Tech-Priests on the station.

Die Promethiumkrise hatte erhebliche Auswirkungen auf Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, da sie die heilige Meditation störte und mehr als ein Drittel der Techpriester auf der Station das Leben kostete.
